questionText: Você quer expressar preocupação com o desmatamento na Amazônia em uma conversa informal com amigos estrangeiros. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I'm really worried about the deforestation going on in the Amazon.
options: I'm really worried about the deforestation going on in the Amazon.
The Amazon is a place where trees are cut.
Deforestation is a word related to trees.
I know about the Amazon forest in Brazil.

questionText: Em uma reunião internacional, você quer sugerir que a empresa reduza o uso de plástico descartável. Qual é a forma mais adequada de fazer essa sugestão?
correctAnswer: Why don't we consider reducing our use of single-use plastics?
options: Why don't we consider reducing our use of single-use plastics?
Plastic is bad and we must stop it now.
Do you like plastic products in your company?
We should buy more plastic items for the office.

questionText: Você quer pedir a um colega que apague as luzes ao sair da sala para economizar energia. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Could you please turn off the lights when you leave? We're trying to save energy.
options: Could you please turn off the lights when you leave? We're trying to save energy.
The lights are on in the room over there.
Energy is something we use every day at work.
Please do not enter the room with the lights.

questionText: Você quer perguntar a um amigo se ele recicla o lixo em casa. Qual é a forma mais natural de fazer essa pergunta em inglês?
correctAnswer: Do you recycle your waste at home?
options: Do you recycle your waste at home?
Are you throwing garbage in the street?
Do you have a trash can in your house?
Is your house full of rubbish?

questionText: Você quer expressar concordância quando alguém diz que devemos usar menos carro e caminhar mais para reduzir a poluição. O que você responde?
correctAnswer: I totally agree. Walking more and driving less would definitely help reduce air pollution.
options: I totally agree. Walking more and driving less would definitely help reduce air pollution.
I don't think cars are a problem for the environment at all.
Cars are the best way to travel in any city.
Walking is only good for your health, not for the environment.

questionText: Você quer recomendar a um amigo que comece a usar sacolas reutilizáveis nas compras. Qual expressão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: You should start using reusable bags when you go shopping.
options: You should start using reusable bags when you go shopping.
Bags are useful for carrying things in the supermarket.
You must always buy new plastic bags at the store.
Shopping is a common activity for most people.

questionText: Durante uma aula sobre mudanças climáticas, você quer perguntar ao professor o significado de 'carbon footprint'. Qual é a forma mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Could you explain what 'carbon footprint' means, please?
options: Could you explain what 'carbon footprint' means, please?
Carbon is a chemical element, isn't it?
What is the color of carbon in the periodic table?
I have never heard of carbon before this class.

questionText: Você quer elogiar uma empresa por adotar práticas sustentáveis. Qual frase expressa melhor esse elogio?
correctAnswer: It's great to see that your company is committed to sustainable practices.
options: It's great to see that your company is committed to sustainable practices.
Your company makes a lot of money with green products.
Sustainable practices are difficult to understand for most businesses.
I think your company sells environmental products.

questionText: Você quer informar a um visitante estrangeiro que a sua cidade tem um programa de compostagem. Como você expressaria isso?
correctAnswer: Our city has a composting program where residents can turn food waste into fertilizer.
options: Our city has a composting program where residents can turn food waste into fertilizer.
Our city has a lot of garbage in the streets unfortunately.
Composting is when people buy special food from the market.
The city collects garbage every morning from the houses.

questionText: Você quer expressar surpresa positiva ao saber que seu amigo instalou painéis solares em sua casa. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: Wow, that's impressive! Solar panels are a great way to reduce your energy bills and help the environment.
options: Wow, that's impressive! Solar panels are a great way to reduce your energy bills and help the environment.
Solar panels are very heavy and hard to install on rooftops.
I didn't know you had a new house with a garden.
Energy bills are always very expensive everywhere.

questionText: Em uma apresentação sobre sustentabilidade, você quer introduzir o tema das energias renováveis. Qual frase é mais adequada para abrir esse tópico?
correctAnswer: I'd like to turn our attention to renewable energy sources and their role in combating climate change.
options: I'd like to turn our attention to renewable energy sources and their role in combating climate change.
Energy is something we need to live and work every day.
Now let's talk about something completely different from the environment.
Renewable means we can use things again and again without stopping.

questionText: Você quer expressar discordância educada quando alguém afirma que o aquecimento global não é causado por atividades humanas. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I see your point, but the scientific consensus suggests that human activities are a major driver of global warming.
options: I see your point, but the scientific consensus suggests that human activities are a major driver of global warming.
You are completely wrong and don't know what you are talking about.
Global warming is a topic that scientists invented recently.
I agree with you that humans have nothing to do with the climate.

questionText: Você quer pedir mais informações sobre como reduzir o desperdício de água em casa. Qual pergunta é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Could you give me some tips on how to reduce water waste at home?
options: Could you give me some tips on how to reduce water waste at home?
Where can I find water near my house?
Is it expensive to use water every day?
Do you know how water is produced in factories?

questionText: Você quer convencer um amigo a participar de um mutirão de limpeza de praia. Qual abordagem persuasiva é mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: It would be really meaningful if you joined us for the beach clean-up. Every hand makes a difference!
options: It would be really meaningful if you joined us for the beach clean-up. Every hand makes a difference!
The beach is a very dirty place and no one wants to go there.
You must clean the beach because it is your legal obligation.
Beaches are popular tourist destinations in many countries.

questionText: Você quer explicar para uma criança estrangeira por que é importante não jogar lixo no chão. Qual frase é mais clara e adequada?
correctAnswer: When we litter, it harms animals and pollutes the soil and water, so it's important to use the bin.
options: When we litter, it harms animals and pollutes the soil and water, so it's important to use the bin.
Litter is a word that means small pieces of paper on the ground.
Animals live in the forest and they like garbage very much.
The bin is a container that you can find in many places.

questionText: Você quer fazer uma reclamação educada a um vizinho sobre o uso excessivo de pesticidas que estão prejudicando o jardim compartilhado. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: I'm a bit concerned that the pesticides you've been using might be affecting the plants we share. Could we find a more eco-friendly solution?
options: I'm a bit concerned that the pesticides you've been using might be affecting the plants we share. Could we find a more eco-friendly solution?
Stop using pesticides immediately or I will call the police on you.
Pesticides are products that you buy in the supermarket for cooking.
Gardens are beautiful places to relax on a sunny afternoon.

questionText: Você quer expressar esperança sobre o futuro do planeta em um discurso escolar. Qual frase transmite melhor esse sentimento?
correctAnswer: I believe that if we work together and make conscious choices, we can leave a healthier planet for future generations.
options: I believe that if we work together and make conscious choices, we can leave a healthier planet for future generations.
The future of the planet is already decided and we cannot change it.
Future generations will have to deal with their own problems.
The planet Earth is the third planet from the Sun in our solar system.

questionText: Em uma negociação com um fornecedor, você quer verificar se os produtos deles são certificados como ambientalmente sustentáveis. Qual é a pergunta mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Could you confirm whether your products hold any environmental sustainability certifications?
options: Could you confirm whether your products hold any environmental sustainability certifications?
Do you sell products that are green in color?
Are your products made of natural materials like wood and stone?
Can you tell me the price of your most expensive eco product?

questionText: Durante um debate ambiental, você quer introduzir um contraponto sobre os desafios econômicos da transição para energias limpas. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: While the benefits of clean energy are undeniable, we should also acknowledge the economic challenges that developing nations face in making this transition.
options: While the benefits of clean energy are undeniable, we should also acknowledge the economic challenges that developing nations face in making this transition.
Clean energy is cheap and easy for all countries to adopt without any problems.
Developing nations should not worry about the environment since they are poor.
Economic challenges are the same for all countries around the world.

questionText: Você quer expressar frustração de forma educada porque uma proposta de política ambiental foi rejeitada pelo governo. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It's deeply frustrating that the environmental policy proposal was turned down, especially given the urgency of the climate crisis.
options: It's deeply frustrating that the environmental policy proposal was turned down, especially given the urgency of the climate crisis.
The government always makes perfect decisions about everything including the environment.
I am happy that the environmental proposal was rejected by the authorities.
Environmental policies are things that only scientists need to worry about.

questionText: Você quer apresentar dados sobre emissões de carbono em uma conferência e precisa contextualizar os números. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: To put these figures into perspective, global CO2 emissions have increased by nearly 50% since the 1990s.
options: To put these figures into perspective, global CO2 emissions have increased by nearly 50% since the 1990s.
CO2 is a gas that plants need to grow in their natural environment.
These numbers are just statistics and don't mean anything important.
Carbon dioxide is used in fizzy drinks and fire extinguishers.

questionText: Em uma entrevista de emprego para uma ONG ambiental, o entrevistador pergunta sobre sua motivação. Como você responderia de forma mais convincente?
correctAnswer: I'm passionate about environmental issues because I believe that protecting ecosystems is essential for the well-being of both people and the planet.
options: I'm passionate about environmental issues because I believe that protecting ecosystems is essential for the well-being of both people and the planet.
I want this job because it pays well and has good working hours.
I like nature and sometimes I go to the park on weekends.
Environmental organizations are popular and have many volunteers.

questionText: Você quer propor uma solução para o problema de ilhas de calor urbano em uma reunião municipal. Qual frase é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: One effective measure to mitigate urban heat islands would be to increase green spaces and plant more trees throughout the city.
options: One effective measure to mitigate urban heat islands would be to increase green spaces and plant more trees throughout the city.
Urban heat islands are places in the ocean where the water is very warm.
We should build more shopping malls to help people stay cool in summer.
The best solution for hot cities is to install more air conditioning units.

questionText: Durante uma negociação de contrato, você quer verificar se um parceiro comercial adota práticas de cadeia de fornecimento responsável em termos ambientais. Qual é a abordagem mais adequada?
correctAnswer: We'd like to understand how you ensure environmental responsibility throughout your supply chain before proceeding with the partnership.
options: We'd like to understand how you ensure environmental responsibility throughout your supply chain before proceeding with the partnership.
We only care about the price and delivery time, not the environment.
Supply chains are about moving products from one place to another efficiently.
Can you show us a list of all the products you currently manufacture?

questionText: Você quer expressar ceticismo sobre as alegações de uma empresa que se diz 'verde' sem apresentar evidências concretas. Como você responderia?
correctAnswer: I'm somewhat skeptical about their environmental claims. Without third-party verification, it could simply be greenwashing.
options: I'm somewhat skeptical about their environmental claims. Without third-party verification, it could simply be greenwashing.
If a company says it's green, we should always believe them completely.
Green companies are the most profitable ones in any market sector.
I think all companies are doing their best to protect the environment.

questionText: Em uma reunião de condomínio, você quer convencer os moradores a instalar um sistema de captação de água da chuva. Qual argumento persuasivo é mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: Investing in a rainwater harvesting system would not only reduce our water bills significantly but also lessen our environmental impact during dry seasons.
options: Investing in a rainwater harvesting system would not only reduce our water bills significantly but also lessen our environmental impact during dry seasons.
Rainwater is dirty and should not be collected for any purpose whatsoever.
Installing new systems in buildings is always too expensive to be worth it.
Water bills are fixed costs that cannot be reduced no matter what we do.

questionText: Você precisa resumir para um público não especialista o conceito de biodiversidade e sua importância. Qual explicação é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Biodiversity refers to the variety of life on Earth, and it's crucial because healthy ecosystems depend on diverse species to function properly.
options: Biodiversity refers to the variety of life on Earth, and it's crucial because healthy ecosystems depend on diverse species to function properly.
Biodiversity is a scientific word that only biologists use in their research.
Having many different animals in a zoo is an example of biodiversity.
Biodiversity means that all living organisms are exactly the same species.

questionText: Você quer expressar apoio a uma petição online que pede medidas mais rígidas contra o despejo ilegal de resíduos industriais. Qual comentário é mais adequado?
correctAnswer: I fully support this petition. Stricter enforcement against illegal dumping of industrial waste is long overdue.
options: I fully support this petition. Stricter enforcement against illegal dumping of industrial waste is long overdue.
Industrial waste is a normal part of any manufacturing process and should be accepted.
Petitions online are not effective and never lead to real changes in policy.
I think companies should be free to dispose of their waste however they like.

questionText: Em uma aula de inglês, um aluno afirma que os países ricos têm mais responsabilidade histórica nas mudanças climáticas. Como você expressa concordância parcial com nuance?
correctAnswer: There's certainly a strong case for that argument, given that industrialized nations have historically contributed the most to cumulative greenhouse gas emissions.
options: There's certainly a strong case for that argument, given that industrialized nations have historically contributed the most to cumulative greenhouse gas emissions.
Rich countries are always right in everything they do including environmental decisions.
All countries are equally responsible for climate change regardless of their history.
Greenhouse gases are only produced by tropical countries near the equator.

questionText: Você está escrevendo um e-mail formal para uma prefeitura solicitando a criação de ciclovias para incentivar o transporte sustentável. Qual é a abertura mais adequada?
correctAnswer: I am writing to formally request the development of a dedicated cycling lane network as part of the city's sustainable transportation strategy.
options: I am writing to formally request the development of a dedicated cycling lane network as part of the city's sustainable transportation strategy.
Hey, we want more bike lanes in the city because it would be pretty cool.
Bicycles are a great invention and many people enjoy riding them.
Please build bike paths because traffic jams are annoying for everyone.

questionText: Durante uma conferência ambiental, você quer questionar educadamente a viabilidade de uma proposta de descarbonização que ignora os custos sociais. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: While the decarbonization roadmap is ambitious, I wonder whether sufficient attention has been given to its social and economic implications for vulnerable communities.
options: While the decarbonization roadmap is ambitious, I wonder whether sufficient attention has been given to its social and economic implications for vulnerable communities.
Decarbonization is too complicated and nobody really understands what it means.
Social implications are not important when we are talking about the environment.
This proposal is completely wrong and should be rejected immediately.

questionText: Você quer justificar a importância do consumo consciente em uma redação acadêmica. Qual frase serve melhor como argumento principal?
correctAnswer: Conscious consumption plays a pivotal role in sustainability, as individual purchasing decisions collectively drive demand for either environmentally harmful or responsible products.
options: Conscious consumption plays a pivotal role in sustainability, as individual purchasing decisions collectively drive demand for either environmentally harmful or responsible products.
People should buy whatever they want because freedom of choice is a basic right.
Shopping habits have no real impact on the environment or natural resources.
Consumption is an economic concept that only relates to money and profit.

questionText: Você quer expressar que uma política de carbono zero é necessária, mas reconhecer que a implementação é complexa. Qual nuance linguística é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Although achieving net-zero carbon emissions is imperative, the pathway to get there is undeniably complex and requires careful policy design.
options: Although achieving net-zero carbon emissions is imperative, the pathway to get there is undeniably complex and requires careful policy design.
Net-zero is simple to achieve and all governments should do it by next year.
Carbon emissions are not a serious problem and don't need complex solutions.
Policy design is something that governments should leave to businesses.

questionText: Em um painel de discussão, você quer argumentar que a educação ambiental nas escolas é fundamental para a mudança de comportamento a longo prazo. Qual é o argumento mais bem estruturado?
correctAnswer: Environmental education in schools is fundamental because it shapes the values and behaviors of future generations, fostering long-term cultural shifts towards sustainability.
options: Environmental education in schools is fundamental because it shapes the values and behaviors of future generations, fostering long-term cultural shifts towards sustainability.
Children learn about nature by watching TV documentaries at home.
Schools should focus only on mathematics and sciences and not on the environment.
Environmental topics are too difficult for young students to understand properly.

questionText: Você precisa rebater o argumento de que a tecnologia sozinha resolverá a crise climática, sem necessidade de mudanças comportamentais. Qual refutação é mais eficaz?
correctAnswer: Technological solutions are essential, but without meaningful behavioral change at both individual and societal levels, they alone cannot address the root causes of climate change.
options: Technological solutions are essential, but without meaningful behavioral change at both individual and societal levels, they alone cannot address the root causes of climate change.
Technology has already solved all environmental problems and we should not worry.
Behavioral change is impossible because human nature cannot be altered.
The climate crisis will be solved automatically without any intervention needed.

questionText: Em um artigo de opinião, você quer argumentar contra a narrativa de que o crescimento econômico e a sustentabilidade são mutuamente excludentes. Qual frase melhor captura esse argumento?
correctAnswer: The false dichotomy between economic growth and sustainability overlooks the mounting evidence that green investments can drive innovation, create jobs, and yield long-term prosperity.
options: The false dichotomy between economic growth and sustainability overlooks the mounting evidence that green investments can drive innovation, create jobs, and yield long-term prosperity.
Economic growth is always more important than protecting the natural environment.
Sustainability initiatives always lead to economic recession and job losses.
Green investments are only viable for wealthy countries with large budgets.

questionText: Você está negociando um acordo climático internacional e quer propor um mecanismo de responsabilidade comum, porém diferenciada, para as nações. Qual formulação diplomática é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: We propose a framework grounded in the principle of common but differentiated responsibilities, reflecting each nation's historical emissions and current capabilities.
options: We propose a framework grounded in the principle of common but differentiated responsibilities, reflecting each nation's historical emissions and current capabilities.
All countries should follow exactly the same rules regardless of their development level.
Developed nations should have no obligations since they already solved their problems.
Climate agreements are not necessary because each country can act independently.

questionText: Em uma avaliação de impacto ambiental corporativa, você precisa descrever a estratégia de compensação de carbono adotada pela empresa. Qual formulação é mais precisa e adequada ao contexto?
correctAnswer: Our carbon offset strategy involves investing in verified reforestation projects and renewable energy initiatives that compensate for our residual emissions.
options: Our carbon offset strategy involves investing in verified reforestation projects and renewable energy initiatives that compensate for our residual emissions.
We plant one tree every year to compensate for all our company's pollution.
Carbon offset means that we stopped emitting greenhouse gases completely.
Our company donates money to charities that say they protect the environment.

questionText: Num seminário acadêmico, você quer criticar a abordagem tecnocrática na governança ambiental que ignora o conhecimento ecológico tradicional das comunidades indígenas. Qual crítica é mais bem formulada?
correctAnswer: A purely technocratic approach to environmental governance tends to marginalize indigenous ecological knowledge, which has proven invaluable for sustainable land management over centuries.
options: A purely technocratic approach to environmental governance tends to marginalize indigenous ecological knowledge, which has proven invaluable for sustainable land management over centuries.
Indigenous communities should not participate in environmental decisions as they lack formal education.
Technocracy is the best system for managing all environmental resources globally.
Traditional knowledge is outdated and has no place in modern environmental science.

questionText: Você quer articular a diferença entre adaptação e mitigação climática em um relatório técnico para um cliente corporativo. Qual explicação é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: While mitigation focuses on reducing greenhouse gas emissions to limit the extent of climate change, adaptation involves adjusting systems and practices to manage the unavoidable impacts that are already occurring.
options: While mitigation focuses on reducing greenhouse gas emissions to limit the extent of climate change, adaptation involves adjusting systems and practices to manage the unavoidable impacts that are already occurring.
Mitigation and adaptation are synonyms that both mean reducing pollution levels.
Adaptation means ignoring climate change and continuing with current practices.
Mitigation is only relevant for countries that have already achieved carbon neutrality.

questionText: Em uma reunião com investidores, você precisa explicar o risco de ativos encalhados (stranded assets) no setor de combustíveis fósseis à luz das políticas climáticas emergentes. Qual formulação é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: As climate regulations tighten, fossil fuel assets risk becoming stranded — that is, losing their economic value before the end of their expected lifespan due to policy shifts and market changes.
options: As climate regulations tighten, fossil fuel assets risk becoming stranded — that is, losing their economic value before the end of their expected lifespan due to policy shifts and market changes.
Fossil fuel companies will always be profitable regardless of environmental regulations.
Stranded assets are physical objects that get lost during transportation at sea.
Climate regulations will never affect the profitability of the energy sector.

questionText: Você precisa contestar, com base em evidências, a afirmação de que as metas do Acordo de Paris são suficientes para evitar consequências climáticas catastróficas. Qual resposta é mais fundamentada?
correctAnswer: Current commitments under the Paris Agreement, even if fully implemented, are insufficient to limit warming to 1.5°C — a threshold scientists consider critical to avoiding the most severe climate impacts.
options: Current commitments under the Paris Agreement, even if fully implemented, are insufficient to limit warming to 1.5°C — a threshold scientists consider critical to avoiding the most severe climate impacts.
The Paris Agreement has completely solved the global climate crisis already.
1.5°C of warming would actually benefit agricultural productivity in most regions.
Scientific models are unreliable and cannot predict future climate conditions accurately.

questionText: Em um debate sobre justiça climática, você quer argumentar que as comunidades mais vulneráveis sofrem desproporcionalmente com os efeitos das mudanças climáticas, apesar de contribuírem menos para o problema. Qual argumento é mais coerente?
correctAnswer: Climate injustice is starkly evident when we consider that the communities least responsible for global emissions — often the poorest — bear the heaviest burden of its consequences, from rising sea levels to extreme weather events.
options: Climate injustice is starkly evident when we consider that the communities least responsible for global emissions — often the poorest — bear the heaviest burden of its consequences, from rising sea levels to extreme weather events.
Poor communities benefit from climate change because warmer temperatures improve crop yields.
Wealthy nations are the most affected by extreme weather events caused by climate change.
Justice requires that all countries reduce emissions by the same absolute amount annually.

questionText: Você precisa formular uma pergunta precisa para um painel de especialistas sobre as implicações do conceito de 'limites planetários' para a política econômica global. Qual questão é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: How should the concept of planetary boundaries inform the design of global economic policies to ensure that human activity remains within the Earth's biophysical limits?
options: How should the concept of planetary boundaries inform the design of global economic policies to ensure that human activity remains within the Earth's biophysical limits?
Are planetary boundaries a real scientific concept or just a political slogan?
Which planets in the solar system have the most natural resources available?
Do economic policies affect the physical size of the Earth's boundaries?

questionText: Em um contexto de negociação multilateral, você quer expressar que a transferência de tecnologia verde para países em desenvolvimento é essencial para uma transição climática equitativa. Qual é a formulação mais diplomática e precisa?
correctAnswer: A just climate transition necessitates robust mechanisms for green technology transfer to developing nations, enabling them to industrialize without replicating the carbon-intensive pathways of wealthier countries.
options: A just climate transition necessitates robust mechanisms for green technology transfer to developing nations, enabling them to industrialize without replicating the carbon-intensive pathways of wealthier countries.
Developing countries should simply copy what rich countries have already done to develop economically.
Technology transfer is unnecessary because all countries can develop their own technologies independently.
Green technology is too advanced for developing countries and should remain with wealthy nations.

questionText: Você quer descrever com precisão o fenômeno do branqueamento de corais e suas causas em uma apresentação científica para um público internacional. Qual descrição é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Coral bleaching occurs when elevated sea temperatures cause corals to expel the symbiotic algae they depend on for nutrients, leaving them vulnerable to disease and mortality.
options: Coral bleaching occurs when elevated sea temperatures cause corals to expel the symbiotic algae they depend on for nutrients, leaving them vulnerable to disease and mortality.
Coral bleaching is a natural seasonal process that strengthens coral reefs over time.
Bleached corals are healthier than normal corals and recover quickly from the process.
Coral reefs turn white due to increased sunlight exposure during summer months.

questionText: Em uma conferência de alto nível, você quer propor a adoção de uma abordagem de economia circular como alternativa ao modelo linear de produção e consumo. Qual argumento é mais bem estruturado?
correctAnswer: Transitioning to a circular economy — where products are designed for longevity, reuse, and recycling — would dramatically reduce resource extraction, waste generation, and the associated environmental degradation.
options: Transitioning to a circular economy — where products are designed for longevity, reuse, and recycling — would dramatically reduce resource extraction, waste generation, and the associated environmental degradation.
A circular economy means that money goes around in circles without any environmental benefit.
The current linear production model is the most efficient system for economic growth.
Recycling programs are too costly and do not provide any real environmental advantages.

questionText: Você precisa explicar o conceito de 'ecocídio' e defender sua inclusão como crime internacional em um texto jurídico-ambiental. Qual formulação é mais precisa?
correctAnswer: Ecocide, broadly defined as the large-scale destruction of ecosystems, deserves recognition as an international crime given the severity and irreversibility of environmental harm it entails.
options: Ecocide, broadly defined as the large-scale destruction of ecosystems, deserves recognition as an international crime given the severity and irreversibility of environmental harm it entails.
Ecocide is a term used to describe eco-friendly products sold in supermarkets.
Environmental destruction is not serious enough to be considered a criminal act.
International law cannot regulate environmental issues because they are purely local matters.

questionText: Em um relatório de sustentabilidade corporativa, você precisa comunicar os compromissos da empresa com as metas ESG de forma transparente e verificável. Qual abordagem comunicativa é mais adequada?
correctAnswer: Our ESG commitments are underpinned by independently audited metrics and aligned with internationally recognized frameworks, ensuring accountability and transparency to all stakeholders.
options: Our ESG commitments are underpinned by independently audited metrics and aligned with internationally recognized frameworks, ensuring accountability and transparency to all stakeholders.
We are a green company because our logo is the color green and we like nature.
ESG metrics are internal numbers that companies are not required to share publicly.
Our sustainability commitments are flexible and can be adjusted whenever necessary.

questionText: Você quer articular a relação entre perda de biodiversidade e segurança alimentar global em um discurso para formuladores de políticas. Qual argumento é mais convincente e bem fundamentado?
correctAnswer: The accelerating loss of biodiversity poses a direct threat to global food security, as the collapse of pollinator populations, soil microbiomes, and wild plant genetic diversity undermines the foundations of agricultural systems.
options: The accelerating loss of biodiversity poses a direct threat to global food security, as the collapse of pollinator populations, soil microbiomes, and wild plant genetic diversity undermines the foundations of agricultural systems.
Biodiversity loss has no direct connection to food production or human nutrition.
Modern agriculture is completely independent of wild species and natural ecosystems.
Food security is solely determined by trade policies and has nothing to do with nature.
